tagline: Sonoma County's trusted name in heating and cooling
seoDescription: Atlas Heating & Air Conditioning is a family-run HVAC contractor in Santa Rosa, CA, serving all of Sonoma County since 2008. Trane and Daikin dealer specializing in heating, air conditioning, and ductless mini-split installation, repair, and maintenance for homes, manufactured homes, and light commercial buildings. Call (707) 571-7522.
heroHeading: Heating & Air Conditioning Done Right in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: A locally owned, family-run HVAC contractor serving Sonoma County for over 17 years. Trane and Daikin installation, repair, and maintenance for homes and light commercial spaces.
highlights: Locally owned and family-run in Santa Rosa since 2008
Authorized Trane and Daikin dealer, including ductless mini-split systems
Serves all of Sonoma County: Santa Rosa, Sebastopol, Windsor, Rohnert Park and beyond
Residential, manufactured/mobile home, and light commercial HVAC
A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau
Free estimates on new Trane and Daikin system installations
aboutHeading: Your Local Sonoma County HVAC Team
aboutBody: Atlas Heating & Air Conditioning, Inc. has been keeping Sonoma County comfortable since 2008. Owned by Ryan Gordon and based at 560 Silva Avenue in Santa Rosa, Atlas is a locally owned, family-run contractor focused on doing honest, high-quality work for the people of the North Bay.

Over more than 17 years in business, Atlas has built a reputation for craftsmanship-style work at fair prices. The team provides service and installation for residential homes, manufactured and mobile homes, and light commercial buildings, and is a local Trane and Daikin dealer that specializes in installing all Trane and Daikin products, including ductless mini-split systems.

Customers regularly point to Ryan and his crew when they want the job done well. One longtime client put it simply: "I'm thrilled with their work and they will be the only folks who touch my HVAC from now on." That kind of trust is what keeps Atlas a go-to HVAC contractor across Sonoma County.

services.title: Heating Installation & Repair
services.description: Furnace and heating system installation and repair for residential, manufactured, and mobile homes, featuring energy-efficient Trane equipment.

services.title: Air Conditioning Service & Repair
services.description: Expert A/C maintenance, cleaning, and repair to keep your home cool through Sonoma County summers.

services.title: Ductless Mini-Split Systems
services.description: As a Trane and Daikin mini-split dealer, Atlas installs ductless systems for efficient, zoned heating and cooling where ductwork isn't practical.

services.title: Ductwork Installation & Repair
services.description: Professional duct installation, maintenance, and repair to improve airflow, comfort, and system efficiency.

services.title: New System Installation
services.description: Free estimates on new installations of more efficient, cost-effective Trane and Daikin equipment for homes and light commercial buildings.

services.title: Light Commercial HVAC
services.description: Heating and air conditioning service and installation for light commercial properties throughout Sonoma County.

testimonials.quote: I'm thrilled with their work and they will be the only folks who touch my HVAC from now on.
testimonials.author: Verified customer

testimonials.quote: If you want a really good job, call Ryan.
testimonials.author: Verified customer

notes:
RIGHT BUSINESS CONFIRMED via matching phone (707) 571-7522 and address 560 Silva Ave, Santa Rosa CA 95404 across BBB, BuildZoom, Yelp, Birdeye, and the live site.

CRITICAL DISAMBIGUATION: Do NOT confuse this with the historic "Atlas Heating & Ventilating" (atlasheat.com / atlasheating.com) founded 1908 in Oakland/South San Francisco — that is a DIFFERENT, unrelated company. Several search-engine summaries bled "since 1908, fourth-generation family business" into this Santa Rosa company; that is INCORRECT. The Santa Rosa company (this one) started 2/1/2008 and incorporated 8/26/2008 per BBB. I deliberately wrote copy around 2008 / "over 17 years," never 1908.

CONFIRMED FACTS:
- Owner: Ryan Gordon (BBB, reviews reference "Ryan"). Office Manager: Stacey Searles (BBB).
- Established: started 2/1/2008, incorporated 8/26/2008 (BBB). Live site says "serving for 17 years."
- License: CSLB #917129 (also 823230 cited on BuildZoom), type "Warm Air Heating, Ventilating And Air Conditioning." Note BuildZoom flagged a license as inactive/expired May 2023 — recommend the owner verify current CSLB status before publishing license claims prominently.
- BBB: A+ rating, NOT BBB-accredited. ~2 employees.
- Services/brands: local Trane and Daikin dealer, specializes in Trane/Daikin including ductless mini-splits; residential, manufactured/mobile homes, light commercial; furnace, A/C, duct work; free estimates on new installs only.
- Service area: all of Sonoma County (Santa Rosa, plus commonly Sebastopol, Windsor, Rohnert Park — the latter towns appeared in a search summary, kept as 'and beyond' in copy to stay safe).

RATING: Used 4.3 (8 reviews) from Birdeye/Google aggregate as the most defensible figure. CAVEAT: Angi shows 5/5, BestProsInTown shows 5 stars (13 reviews), Yelp shows 38 reviews (rating not retrieved — Yelp returned 403). Ratings vary by platform; the 4.3 is conservative. Owner should confirm preferred review source.

HOURS: Sources conflict slightly — Yelp/Yahoo list Mon-Thu 9:00-5:00, Fri-Sun closed; BestProsInTown lists Mon-Thu 8:30-4:00. All agree open Mon-Thu, closed Sat-Sun. I used 9-5 Mon-Thu and marked Friday "By appointment" to be safe. VERIFY exact hours with owner.

PHOTOS: No first-party photo URLs captured. Yelp (20 photos) returned 403; the live site (heatingservicesantarosa.com) repeatedly returned ECONNREFUSED during fetch attempts so I could not extract image URLs. realPhotoUrls left EMPTY rather than risk stock/logo images. Recommend pulling real job photos from their Yelp gallery or Google Business Profile manually.

SOCIAL: No verified Facebook/Instagram/Google profile URLs found for THIS specific Santa Rosa entity — left blank to avoid linking the wrong company.

TESTIMONIALS: Real quotes sourced from Birdeye/Google ("If you want a really good job call Ryan" - Richard Iribarne) and BestProsInTown ("I'm thrilled with their work..."). 

SOURCES: BBB (bbb.org/.../atlas-heating-air-conditioning-inc-1116-303512), BuildZoom (buildzoom.com/contractor/atlas-heating-and-air-conditioning-inc), live site heatingservicesantarosa.com, Birdeye (reviews.birdeye.com/atlas-heating-air-conditioning-165388938911143), BestProsInTown, Angi, Yelp (biz/atlas-heating-and-air-conditioning-santa-rosa). confirmed=true.
